theme: Light theme default, warm, trustworthy, and culturally rooted. 'Light and bold' design language.

typography.instructions: Use Google Fonts 'Anek Bangla' for bold, modern headings and 'Hind Siliguri' for highly legible body text supporting both Bengali, Devanagari (Hindi/Nepali), and Latin. Load them via Google Fonts in index.css.

colors.instructions: Use Pine Green (#2C5E3B) as primary to represent Darjeeling's tea gardens and forests. Use Prayer Flag Red (#C42E2E) as secondary for interactive or high-visibility accents. Use warm Golden Yellow (#F0B90B) for highlights and badges. Background should be Mist White (#FAFAFA).

visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid border color, avoiding heavy lines. Use soft radii.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, p-12 for sections.
layouts.grids: Use Bento grids for the discover page. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 with gap-6. Dashboard uses high-density grid.
layouts.header: Solid background with a crisp bottom border. No fully transparent headers.
layouts.alignment: Left-align dense text and labels. Center align hero sections and major CTAs.

components.buttons: Pill-shaped (rounded-full) with clear hover states (hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-md transition-transform duration-200). Primary uses bg-primary text-white.
components.cards: Clean cards with minimal borders (border border-slate-200) and rounded-2xl. Image constraints max-h-[80vh] for mobile.
components.inputs: Shadcn inputs with rounded-xl, 1px border, subtle focus ring (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20).
components.language_switcher: Prominent dropdown in header to toggle Bengali, English, Hindi, Nepali. Default to Bengali.
components.instructions_to_main_agent: Since this is a JS project, use standard JS (+ JSX) for all components. Do NOT use .tsx files. Build robust responsive UI using Tailwind CSS. Incorporate Radix UI or Shadcn JS primitives. Make sure to implement both Tourist (Discovery/E-commerce) and Service Provider (Dashboard) views.

motion.interactions: Hover states on all buttons and cards. Add entrance animations for bento grid items using framer-motion (staggerChildren).
motion.transitions: Use specific transitions: 'transition: transform 0.2s ease, opacity 0.2s ease'. Do NOT use 'transition: all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards. Do not place white text over light green. Use text-shadow over hero images.
accessibility.data_testid: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='booking-submit-button', data-testid='language-switcher').

tea_garden_mist.description: Misty village in tea plantations. Good for hero or background.

tea_plantation.description: Scenic view of tea plantations. Good for biodiversity/nature section.

himalayan_mountain.description: Snow covered Himalayan mountain. Perfect for '1 Darjeeling' branding or hero.

red_panda.description: Red panda on log. Use for Biodiversity section.

indian_cafe.description: South Indian filter coffee. Use for local cafes/shops section.

UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur) where appropriate, but NEVER use completely transparent backgrounds behind text.
You MUST NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all).
You MUST NOT center align the app container (.App { text-align: center; }).
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮🎯 etc for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on provided image URLs. NEVER use placeholder text or dummy image URLs.
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable.
Ensure the application structure explicitly handles the default Bengali language layout, allowing safe fallback to English/Devanagari.
